case_title: BRENDA VIDAL VS. THAI GOURMET METREON, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2018 BY JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF BRENDA VIDAL IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT. DEFENDANT THAI GOURMET METREON, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NAT WONGPREASERT AND NUTTAWAT WONGPISETHLERT LLC MEMBERS. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATED AGREEMENT TO HAVE THEIR CASE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY VIDAL, BRENDA THAI GOURMET METREON, LLC. CORIANDER GOURMET THAI
